programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A high-flying tour of Pennsylvania.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A sky-high tour over Minnesota reveals the state's ancient, glacial landscapes and tells the stories of the pioneers who helped build the nation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: An aerial tour of the world's first national park showcases Yellowstone's diverse wildlife and rich history.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial Argentina
programme.desc: Contrasting the lush peace of the Pampas with the hustle of cosmopolitan Buenos Aires, Argentina; soaring over the obelisk, churches and soccer fields, then over the 200,000 square miles of fertile pasture plied by gauchos and their cattle.

programme.title: Aerial Argentina
programme.desc: Argentina's Patagonia is an environment of extremes, carved by ice and surrounded by violent seas; for wildlife, it's a rugged wilderness where survival is a daily battle; for humans, it's a must-see tourist destination.

programme.title: Aerial Argentina
programme.desc: There is no better way to witness Argentina, and its land of contrasts, than to experience it by air; this soaring tour stretches from one extreme to the next, from vast wetlands to some of the driest places on Earth.

programme.title: Aerial New Zealand
programme.desc: An aerial tour over New Zealand showcases a diverse world of snow-capped mountains, active volcanoes, and a storied past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial Australia
programme.desc: The Pacific Coast of Australia is home to Sydney's architectural icons, Byron Bay's beach breaks, perilous white-water adventures and the Great Barrier Reef, the largest living structure on Earth.

programme.title: Aerial Australia
programme.desc: The hot, dry extreme center of Australia is home to landscapes like nowhere else on Earth; fearsome apex predators, a town built by opals and Uluru, the cultural and spiritual heart of a nation.

programme.title: Aerial Australia
programme.desc: The far south of Australia is home to the rich cultural heritage of Melbourne; a sporting mecca called the G; a brutal island prison once known as hell on Earth and ancient rainforests, providing a living link to the past.

programme.title: Aerial Australia
programme.desc: Western Australia is home to colossal gold mines, massive sheep stations, the world's largest shark, a 4x4 trail; it has Perth, the most isolated big city on Earth.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A false warning in the cockpit triggers a series of pilot errors, sending a commuter plane crashing by the runway of an Amsterdam airport.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: When a turboprop stalls and crashes into a North Carolina forest, investigators resort to a risky test flight-and uncover an industry-wide safety problem.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A plane with members of the Manchester United football team crashes while heading home from Yugoslavia, killing 23 aboard.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: On 28 December 1978, the crew of United Airlines Flight 173 are preoccupied with a landing gear problem as the aircraft circles in a holding pattern in the vicinity of Portland, Oregon; it runs out of fuel and crashes in a sparsely populated area.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A day-long aerial tour of the New England city of Boston in Massachusetts; where Americans first rebelled against Britain by dumping chests of tea into the harbor and where rock band Aerosmith first made it big.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: An aerial tour over the places made famous by America's most influential men and women.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A view of Idaho from the air reveals a state filled with agricultural fields, lands untouched by human hands, and riches in the form of gold, ski resorts and spuds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Louisiana's wetlands and underwater oil fields.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast aerial journey across America, visiting locations made famous by movies such as Rocky, Citizen Kane, Forrest Gump and others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Explore the forests, shores, bridges and tunnels of one of American's 13 original states, New Jersey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Home to some of America's highest mountains; Mount St. Helens.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Natural wonders, manmade marvels, hidden treasures and places of inspiration.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Viewing Oklahoma from the sky reveals a state filled with tall-grass prairies and man-made wonders; the Dust Bowl, Tornado Alley and buffalo-filled plains; it also shows a history steeped in tragedy and devastation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: A flight over Arizona explores the state's storied past, architectural achievements and landscapes, including America's natural wonder, the Grand Canyon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: An aerial tour over America's Great Plains tracks the prairies, farms, oilfields and wildlife.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Vast cotton fields, Gulf coast beaches; famous Civil Rights marches; NASCAR's most dangerous track; steel factories.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: After taking off from Taiwan, a China Airlines 747 suddenly disappears from radar and crashes, killing 225 people.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: Experts examine how the Chernobyl nuclear disaster and the Bhopal gas tragedy happened; they also explore the consequences and how they could have been avoided.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A 1966 landslide in Wales killed 116 children and 28 adults, and a 2019 dam collapse killed 115 people in Brazil.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A 747's cargo door opens at 23,000 feet, causing an explosive decompression that ejects nine passengers from the plane.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A 1966 landslide in Wales killed 116 children and 28 adults, and a 2019 dam collapse killed 115 people in Brazil.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: When Air Transat Flight 236 runs out of fuel over the Atlantic, its pilots desperately try to keep their Airbus A330 in the air until they reach land.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered
programme.desc: A 1966 landslide in Wales killed 116 children and 28 adults, and a 2019 dam collapse killed 115 people in Brazil.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: The U.S. Aviation Weather Center in Kansas City, Miss.; the importance of accurate weather forecasting to the aviation industry.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: On 10 January 2000, Crossair Flight 498 crashes just two minutes after takeoff from Zürich, Switzerland, while heading for Dresden, Germany, killing all 10 people on board.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A team of experts investigates in detail the carnage of a cargo plane; an anonymous tip helps explain why a cargo plane crashed just moments after taking off from Miami.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Relying on instinct rather than the rule book, three flights end in tragedy when crews improvise on their final approach.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A passenger ferry sinks after crashing into rocks off the coast of a Greek island, killing 82; it leads to a shocking investigation.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Near the end of its flight, Continental Express Flight 2574 suffers wing damage and goes into a dive falling out of the sky.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: When an American cargo plane crashes moments after takeoff, investigators uncover a systemic problem with aircraft maintenance.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A Boeing 767 crashes miles from a South Korean runway; the investigation leads to contradicting stories between the surviving pilot and air traffic control.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Almost immediately after taking off from Madrid International Airport, Spanair Flight 5022 banked to the right, slammed into a creek and burst into flames.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: Martinair 495 crashes on a rain-soaked runway in Portugal, showing how weather can doom a landing; American 1572 hits a storm and loses both engines amid a tower shutdown; crosswinds challenge an Air France crew already halfway down the runway.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: An examination of three crashes that occurred when pilots battled against their sophisticated aircraft.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A private jet attempting to compensate for a late approach to the airport, slams into an Ohio apartment building just a couple of miles from the runway.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A high-stakes demonstration flight in Indonesia turns catastrophic when a Russian jet slams into a mountain.

programme.title: Air Disasters
programme.desc: A complex recovery operation is launched to find out if a 747 which disappeared into the Indian Ocean was carrying illegal weapons.
